summary: Iteration 89: Complete testing of 'Registro Apparecchiature & Strumenti' module at /strumenti. All 15 test features verified successfully including page load, stats bar with correct counts (5 Totali, 2 Attivi, 1 In Scadenza, 1 Scaduti, 1 Manutenzione, 0 Fuori Uso), 5 instrument cards, color-coded status badges (Scaduto=red, In Scadenza=amber, Attivo=green), search by manufacturer, CRUD operations (create, edit, delete), and automatic expiry status calculation.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (instruments-page, btn-add-instrument, search-instruments, filter-type, filter-status, stats-bar, stat-*, instruments-grid, inst-card-{id}, btn-edit-{id}, btn-delete-{id})
Backend computed_status calculation working correctly: scaduto for past dates, in_scadenza within 30 days, attivo otherwise
Stats bar always shows global counts regardless of active filters (correct implementation)
Edit/delete buttons use opacity-0 by default, shown on hover - working correctly with force=True clicks
Form dialog validates required fields (name, serial_number) before save
Delete confirmation dialog shows instrument name and serial number
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test instrument 'TEST_Manometro Digitale' during CRUD testing. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Instruments module is fully functional. Key data-testids: instruments-page, btn-add-instrument, search-instruments, filter-type, filter-status, stats-bar, stat-total/attivi/in-scadenza/scaduti/manutenzione/fuori-uso, instruments-grid, inst-card-{id}, btn-edit-{id}, btn-delete-{id}, instrument-form-dialog, input-name, input-serial, select-type, input-manufacturer, input-purchase-date, select-status, input-last-cal, input-next-cal, input-interval, input-notes, btn-save-instrument, delete-dialog, btn-confirm-delete. The 5 seed instruments: Calibro Digitale 150mm (Mitutoyo, attivo), Cesoia Idraulica 3000mm (in_manutenzione), Forno Essicazione Elettrodi (attivo), Micrometro 0-25mm (scaduto), Saldatrice MIG/MAG 320A (in_scadenza).

features_verified.page_load_with_title: PASS - /strumenti loads with 'Apparecchiature e Strumenti' title and subtitle 'Registro tarature e manutenzioni (EN 1090 / ISO 3834)'
features_verified.five_instrument_cards: PASS - 5 instrument cards displayed in grid
features_verified.micrometro_scaduto_badge: PASS - 'Micrometro 0-25mm' shows 'Scaduto' red badge with 'TARATURA SCADUTA' bar
features_verified.saldatrice_in_scadenza_badge: PASS - 'Saldatrice MIG/MAG 320A' shows 'In Scadenza' amber badge
features_verified.calibro_attivo_badge: PASS - 'Calibro Digitale 150mm' shows 'Attivo / Tarato' green badge
features_verified.search_mitutoyo: PASS - Searching 'Mitutoyo' shows only Calibro card
features_verified.search_clear: PASS - Clearing search returns all 5 instruments
features_verified.add_instrument_dialog: PASS - 'Aggiungi Strumento' opens dialog with all fields (name, serial, type, manufacturer, dates, status, notes)
features_verified.create_instrument: PASS - New instrument created, appears in grid, stats update to 6
features_verified.edit_instrument_dialog: PASS - 'Modifica' opens dialog pre-filled with instrument data
features_verified.edit_save: PASS - Changes saved, 'Strumento aggiornato' toast shown
features_verified.delete_confirmation: PASS - Delete shows confirmation dialog with instrument name
features_verified.delete_execute: PASS - Instrument removed, 'Strumento eliminato' toast, stats update
features_verified.backend_expiry_calculation: PASS - computed_status correctly calculates scaduto/in_scadenza/attivo based on next_calibration_date
